text:
(In reply to Michael Tuexen from comment #15)
>Can you remove all traffic from one of your production machines

Unfortunately I cannot stop web-server for a long time. But I can make short test. Is that would be correct test case when I stop nginx and kill all established TCP sessions use tcpdrop?

Offtopic: please check PR 253066. I'm trying to test RACK on 13-STABLE and hit the bug which blocks me.
